goals: Establish the monorepo workspace structure (`apps/backend`, `apps/frontend`, `services/media`) managed by Bun.
Confirm all three services start and respond to `GET /health`.
Verify `comfy-diffusion` can be imported inside the media service (library installed correctly via `uv`).
Provide a single `bun run dev` (or equivalent) script that boots the full stack.
Lay down the environment variable convention with `.env.example`.

userStories.title: Monorepo workspace initialised
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Bun-managed monorepo with three workspace packages (`apps/backend`, `apps/frontend`, `services/media`) so that I can install all dependencies and run any service from the repo root.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Root `package.json` declares workspaces: `apps/backend`, `apps/frontend`, `services/media`.
`bun install` at the repo root succeeds and all workspace dependencies are resolved.
Python dependencies in `services/media` are managed with `uv` (`pyproject.toml` + `uv.lock`).
Typecheck / lint passes.

userStories.title: Backend service scaffolded and healthy
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `apps/backend` to be a minimal ElysiaJS app on Bun so that I can verify the backend is running via a health endpoint.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `apps/backend` has its own `package.json` (Bun workspace member) with `elysia` as a dependency.
`GET /health` returns HTTP 200 with JSON `{ "status": "ok", "service": "backend" }`.
Service starts with `bun run dev` inside `apps/backend`.
Default port is `3000` (configurable via `PORT` env var).
Typecheck / lint passes.

userStories.title: Frontend service scaffolded and reachable
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `apps/frontend` to be a minimal Vite + React (TypeScript) app so that I can open it in a browser and confirm it loads.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `apps/frontend` is scaffolded with Vite + React + TypeScript template.
`bun run dev` inside `apps/frontend` starts the Vite dev server on port `5173` (configurable).
Opening `http://localhost:5173` in a browser renders the default Vite/React placeholder page without console errors.
Typecheck / lint passes.
Visually verified in browser.

userStories.title: Media service scaffolded and healthy
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `services/media` to be a minimal FastAPI app managed with `uv` so that I can verify the service is running via a health endpoint.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `services/media` has a `pyproject.toml` declaring `fastapi`, `uvicorn`, and `comfy-diffusion` as dependencies.
`uv sync` inside `services/media` installs all dependencies without errors.
`GET /health` returns HTTP 200 with JSON `{ "status": "ok", "service": "media" }`.
Service starts with `uv run uvicorn main:app --reload` (or equivalent script).
Default port is `8000` (configurable via `PORT` env var).
Typecheck / lint passes (ruff or flake8 as available).

userStories.title: comfy-diffusion import smoke test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the media service startup to confirm `comfy-diffusion` imports successfully so that I know the library is installed and the pipeline can be used in future iterations.

acceptanceCriteria.text: On application startup, `import comfy_diffusion` (or the library's public API) executes without raising an `ImportError`.
If the import fails, the `GET /health` response includes `{ "status": "degraded", "error": "<message>" }` instead of `"ok"`.
The import result is logged to stdout on startup.

userStories.title: Environment variable convention
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a root-level `.env.example` listing all required and optional environment variables so that any contributor can set up the project without hunting for undocumented config.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `.env.example` exists at the repo root with entries for: `BACKEND_PORT`, `FRONTEND_PORT`, `MEDIA_PORT`, `OPENAI_API_KEY` (placeholder), `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` (placeholder).
Each entry has an inline comment describing its purpose.
`.env` is listed in `.gitignore`.
Typecheck / lint passes.

userStories.title: Unified run scripts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want root-level Bun scripts to start all services so that I can boot the entire stack with one command.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Root `package.json` includes a `dev` script that concurrently starts the backend, frontend, and media service.
`bun run dev` from the repo root boots all three services without manual intervention.
Each service's output is identifiable in the combined log (prefixed or colour-coded).
Typecheck / lint passes.

functionalRequirements.description: ** The monorepo root uses Bun workspaces; all TypeScript packages are members.
** Python dependency management in `services/media` uses `uv` exclusively (no pip/poetry); `pyproject.toml` targets `python = ">=3.12"`.
** Media service (`services/media`) exposes `GET /health` → `200 { status, service }` (or `{ status: "degraded", error }` if comfy-diffusion import fails).
** Frontend (`apps/frontend`) is a Vite + React + TypeScript project loadable in the browser.
** `comfy-diffusion` is declared as a dependency in `services/media/pyproject.toml` and its import is verified at startup.
** `.env.example` documents all environment variables used across the monorepo.
** A root-level `dev` script uses `concurrently` to start all three services in parallel, with colour-coded per-service log prefixes and automatic kill-all if any service exits with an error.
